personal.preferred_title: Staff Data Engineer | AWS Cost, Usage, Python, SQL & Analytics

summary: Staff-level Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building scalable data pipelines, cost and usage analytics, capacity forecasting workflows, executive dashboards, and cloud data platform patterns. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, ETL/ELT, data modeling, query optimization, data quality, automation, and stakeholder-facing reporting. Experienced translating infrastructure usage and telemetry into reliable data products for cost optimization, capacity planning, financial technology attribution, and senior decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built data products that transformed infrastructure usage, capacity, and performance telemetry into analytics-ready datasets for cost optimization, risk forecasting, and executive reporting.
Designed AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Athena-style lake access, and Redshift for analytics and ML forecasting workloads.
Developed scalable processing workflows using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, and AWS services to support technology usage analysis and capacity planning.
Created dashboards and reporting workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and enterprise telemetry data to surface utilization trends, capacity risks, and optimization opportunities.
Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead and improve provisioning and planning lead time.
Implemented data quality, reconciliation, validation, and troubleshooting routines to improve accuracy and reliability of recurring usage and forecasting outputs.
Partnered with technical stakeholders to define data requirements, optimize reporting structures, document workflows, and improve repeatability of data-driven operational processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with technical teams during AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, visibility gaps, and operational support needs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap memory issues, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Cost & Usage Analytics: Infrastructure Usage Analytics, Capacity Planning, Cost Optimization, Financial Technology Usage Attribution Concepts, AWS CUR Concepts, Utilization Reporting, Executive Dashboards
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Processing, Data Modeling, Data Quality, Data Validation, Data Reconciliation, Data Warehousing, Structured and Semi-Structured Data
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java
skills.Cloud Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, AWS Cost and Usage Concepts, Google Cloud Concepts, Azure Cost Management Concepts
skills.Analytics & Dashboards: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Dashboard Data Preparation, KPI Reporting, Operational Analytics, BI Dataset Preparation
skills.Optimization: SQL Performance Tuning, Pipeline Optimization, Data Accessibility Improvement, Bottleneck Troubleshooting, Scalable Data Models, Storage and Query Pattern Optimization
skills.Workflow & DevOps: Apache Airflow, Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Technical Documentation, Production Support, Automation
skills.Modern Stack / Learning: Databricks, dbt, Delta Lake, Medallion Architecture, Databricks Workflows, Unity Catalog Concepts
skills.Leadership: Staff-Level Individual Contribution, Technical Mentorship, Code Review, Stakeholder Collaboration, Requirements Translation, Cross-Functional Delivery
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Transaction Tracing

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise infrastructure telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking.
